message:
fix: closure analysis for local vars and self.method() calls

- Make findLocalVars recursive to find assignments in nested blocks
  (for loops, while loops, if statements, try-except, with statements)
- Skip capturing 'self' when used in self.method() calls since codegen
  dispatches these specially without needing the actual self value
- Fixes closure capture bugs where local vars in for-loop bodies were
  wrongly captured, and self was captured when unnecessary
